pr.title: v16: Invoice photos, required Note, Chime tab, expense-only finance, period-based Job Revenue
pr.body:
## Summary

Six feature enhancements to the dashboard (v16):

1. **Invoice photo uploads** — new "Invoices" file input in Log a New Entry. Upload up to 5 photos per entry. Images are resized (max 800px) and compressed to JPEG at 60% quality to keep localStorage manageable. A 📎 icon appears in the entry log to view uploaded invoices. Thumbnails also shown in the edit modal.

2. **Note field now required** — changed from optional to required with the same red accent highlighting as Category and Revenue.

3. **Chime Payments tab** — new third tab with:
   - Manual transaction entry (Deposit, Withdrawal, Transfer In/Out, Payment Received, Fee)
   - CSV import from Chime transaction exports with auto-categorization
   - Bar chart with daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly period selector
   - Breakdown grid and summary strip (balance, total deposits, total withdrawals, transaction count)
   - Edit/delete per transaction
   - Drag & drop CSV upload
   - Note: Chime does not offer a public API for third-party integration, so this uses manual entry + CSV import

4. **Removed "Money Received" from Breakdown** — auto-removes legacy "Money Received" from the financeTypes array on load

5. **Expense-only finance section** — renamed "Log Revenue / Expense" to "Log Expense". Revenue now comes exclusively from job entries. Finance form dropdown only shows expense types. Finance log shows all amounts as expenses.

6. **Job Revenue period-based breakdown** — the Breakdown grid now filters by the selected period (today, this week, this month, this quarter). Both Job Revenue and expense totals reflect only entries within the current period range.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Invoice upload**: Go to Customer & Jobs → Log a New Entry → select 1-5 images in the Invoices field → submit → verify 📎 icon appears in the log → click it → verify images display in the modal
- [ ] **Note required**: Try submitting an entry with an empty Note field → verify it blocks submission with a toast message
- [ ] **Chime tab**: Click the "Chime Payments" tab → add a manual transaction → verify it appears in the log and charts. Try importing a CSV file.
- [ ] **Money Received removed**: Go to Revenues & Expenses → verify "Money Received" no longer appears in the Breakdown grid, form dropdown, or Manage Types list
- [ ] **Expense-only form**: Verify the section says "Log Expense" and the Type dropdown only has expense categories
- [ ] **Period-based breakdown**: Add job entries with different dates → switch between Daily/Weekly/Monthly/Quarterly → verify the Breakdown grid shows correct period-filtered totals for Job Revenue

### Test plan
1. Hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) to load v16
2. Test each feature above in order
3. Verify existing data (entries, categories, etc.) is preserved after update
4. Test on mobile after syncing

### Notes
- Invoice photos are stored as base64 in localStorage only (not synced to Supabase due to size constraints). They persist per-browser.
- Legacy "Money Received" entries will still appear in the Finance Log but won't affect revenue calculations.
- The Chime tab data is also localStorage-only for now.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/6039104f0b2a4194af27b6686cc684be
Requested by: @fullhousedeliveryllc-wq
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
